# Athletic Resilience

> Athletic Resilience helps everyday athletes build strength, prevent injury, and recover faster
> through practical, follow-along sports-medicine education from licensed clinicians.
> Recovery that's smarter, training that's sustainable, and strategies that work in real life —
> not just on paper. Tagline: "Easy. Effective. For Everyone." Motto: "Be Resilient."
> Philosophy: "Train. Recover. Perform."

## What it is
- Sports-medicine education and coaching for everyday athletes, built by licensed clinicians.
- Mission: bring durable health and performance to everyone through formative habits that
  maintain elite performance and a pain-free lifestyle.
- Belief: the body works in fascial movement patterns that connect you from head to toe.
- Founded by Dr. Lee Schuster (DC, ATC), with co-founder Dr. Greg (DPT).

## Who it serves — three distinct buyers
- Athletes (end consumers): athletes, parents, coaches buying self-serve courses and 1-on-1
  sessions. Scalable top-of-funnel.
- Clinicians: ATs, PTs, DCs, massage therapists, and personal trainers buying accredited
  continuing education (CEUs) — the high-value segment, anchored by Dr. Lee's taping reputation.
- Teams, schools, and clubs: buying live workshops, on-site clinics, and seasonal consulting.

## Founders — what each brings
- Dr. Lee Schuster (DC, ATC): field credibility and signature IP. ATC enables hands-on,
  on-site, sideline, and event work; taping is the crown jewel — an evidence-informed method
  built on fascial slings and movement patterns that other clinicians pay to learn. 15+ years
  across rugby, football, hockey, lacrosse at pro/collegiate levels.
- Dr. Greg (DPT): clinical authority and performance. DPT enables clinical rehab and
  return-to-play; advanced training in sports performance, strength & conditioning, and recovery;
  former Division I athlete; spans pro down to high school plus the general population.
- Together they cover the full prevent → perform → recover → rehab continuum, packaged as
  knowledge rather than chair time.

## Three pillars
1. Build strength — sustainable training that holds up in real life.
2. Prevent injury — practical movement and taping skills that keep you in the game.
3. Recover faster — smarter recovery and self-treatment routines.

## Products — for individuals
- Muscle Mobility Techniques — $49.99 — follow-along course to release tension, improve
  flexibility, and move with confidence through self-treatment routines.
- Taping Essentials — $39.99 — 13 video lessons on common athletic tape jobs (ankle, wrist,
  thumb, shoulder, elbow, turf toe, and more) with clear anatomical guidance.
- 1-on-1 Coaching with Dr. Lee — $100 / 60 min — real-time remote feedback on sustainable
  strategies, injury planning, nutrition, and strength & conditioning.
- 1-on-1 Coaching with Dr. Greg — $100 / 60 min — remote performance and recovery coaching.

## Products — for clinicians (accredited CE) [in development]
The highest-leverage segment: clinician continuing education, anchored by Dr. Lee's taping IP.
Benchmark: accredited taping CE typically runs ~$200–$600/seat (e.g. RockTape FMT ~$199.99–
$299.99 for ~8.25 CE hours, with CEUs across DC, ATC, PT, LMT, and personal trainers; on-demand,
live-webinar, and in-person formats). Final CE hours/professions confirmed at launch.
- Taping Certification — from ~$249/seat — flagship accredited credential in Dr. Lee's
  evidence-informed taping (fascial slings / movement patterns).
- Movement & Recovery CE — from ~$199/seat — Dr. Greg's performance and rehab curriculum:
  return-to-play, strength & conditioning, recovery.
- In-Person Taping Workshop — custom — live, hands-on, hosted at a clinic, school, or conference.

## Products — for teams ("tune-ups")
A team is a well-oiled machine; each position is a part that needs maintenance. Athletic
Resilience keeps every athlete on a roster in peak working order. Pricing is illustrative and
scoped per team. (Brainstorm-stage packages, modeled on sports-performance consultant tiers.)
- Position Group Tune-Up — from ~$499 / position group — virtual consult for all athletes who
  play the same position; built around that role's movement demands and injury patterns.
- Full-Team Tune-Up — from ~$1,500 / team — virtual consult for the whole roster: mobility,
  prehab, taping, and recovery across the team.
- Season Maintenance Plan — custom / season — recurring virtual tune-ups, in-season load and
  recovery guidance, and on-call support for staff.
- On-Site Tune-Up — custom — in-person movement screening, taping clinics, and hands-on work
  with athletes at your facility.
